name: The Real Thing
description: '''The Real Thing''' are a British [[British soul|soul]] group formed in the 1970s. The band charted internationally with their song "[[You to Me Are Everything]]", which reached No. 1 on the [[UK Singles Chart]]. They also had successes with a string of British hits such as "[[Can't Get By Without You]]" and "[[Can You Feel the Force?]]". They returned to mainstream success in 1986 with the Decade Remix of "You to Me Are Everything". By number of sales, they were the most successful [[Black British|black]] rock/soul act in England during the 1970s. The journalist, author and founder of ''[[Mojo (magazine)|Mojo]]'' magazine [[Paul Du Noyer]] credits them alongside [[Deaf School]] with restoring "[[Liverpool]]'s musical reputation in the 1970s" with their success.
